plan.reasoning: Use the Strength Potion for scaling in this long Elite fight. Play Wrought in War on Phantasmal Gardener [2] (highest intent at 7 dmg) to deal damage and spawn the Sovereign Blade. The Sovereign Blade (10 base + 7 Forge + 2 Str = 19 dmg) will finish off Gardener [2]. Play Falling Star on Gardener [1] to apply Weak and reduce its damage from 5 to 3. With Enemy 2 dead and Enemy 1 weakened, total incoming damage drops to 6. Play two Defends to gain 10 Block, fully protecting against the remaining 6 damage and conserving HP.
plan.note_to_future_self: Sovereign Blade is active and buffed by Strength. Keep generating stars for Stardust+ next turn.
